description: The UserPoseController component is used to control the posing of the user.

fields.RenderDebugVisuals: Whether or not to render the debug visuals.
fields.PauseLocomotionAnimation: Whether or not to pause the current locomotion animation.
fields.OverrideLocomotionVelocity: What to override the current locomotion animation with.
fields.OverrideLocomotionAngularVelocity: What to override the current locomotion animation angular velocity with.
fields._defaultConfig: What the default locomotion animation for all avatars that don't specify it should be.
